name: Cyril Ashley
description: Vice-president of the Student Council at Serendia Academy. A third-year student in the high school division. Born to a father of marquess descent and a mother of commoner origins. After his father's death, he was adopted by distant relatives, the Marquess Highown, and lives away from his mother. He adores [Felix](https://anilist.co/character/359150), and works diligently and earnestly to support the student council president. He also has an aptitude for magic, and can use ice magic.

name: Eeta
description: Eeta is, like her twin sister Elena, one of the eleven who helped make Greed Island. One of the E's in "Greed" comes from her name. She is in charge of moving people from the real world to Greed Island. She plays the tape for Gon, left behind by his father.
